ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the facility is located */,
  "ig_xcord" REAL /* X-coordinate of the facility in the Irish Grid system */,
  "ig_ycord" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the facility in the Irish Grid system */,
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of facility (e.g., pharmacy, healthcare center) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the facility details were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the facility record */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* JSON field to store the operating hours of the facility */,
  "facilities_status" TEXT /* Enum field to indicate the operational status of the facility */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Integer field to track the version of the facility details */,
  "last_versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last versioned the facility details */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_last_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("facility_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type (e.g., pharmacy, healthcare center) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, facility manager, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last modified */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the inventory is managed */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item available */,
  "last_stock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for reordering */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., medication, health product) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the item */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the patient was treated */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided during the visit */,
  "prescription" TEXT /* Prescription given to the patient */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the patient record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service log */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the service was performed */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of service provided */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the service log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_logs_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type (e.g., pharmacy check-up, health consultation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the facility */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the facility */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional metadata about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
